title: hippia frutescens
intro: Hippia frutescens, also known as the Sea Lavender or Prickly Sea Lavender, is a shrub-like plant native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects, which help to soothe and calm the body. The health benefits of Hippia frutescens include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and relieving digestive issues. Hippia frutescens can be prepared as an herbal tea, essential oil, or dried herb, and is often used in aromatherapy and traditional medicine to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
